overview: AUG MAXXLITE® sets are designed with enclosed fiber optic bundle.It has no cavities to trap dirt or body fluids thus allowing the blade to be easily cleaned.Set comes with variations in blades size as well as with different illuminations i.e. LED and Xenon.handles comes with textured surface for secure grip. Constructed with brass and has endless finish of chromium plating, it also has German illumination technology.
features: Enclosed fiber optic core with 4.5mm diameter.
High quality fibers ensuring brilliant light transmission.
No adverse effect in using ETO, steam autoclaving or by soaking in Sparax or Cidex.
2.5V Xenon & LED lamp is constructed with advanced German technology.
Lamp can be easily supersede with help of fingers.
50000+ hours life of LED & 10 hours of Xenon.
More than 100,000+ Lux with LED & 11000 Lux with Xenon.
Grooved & Knurled handle design provides excellent grip.
Can be easily operated with 2 x AA or C size dry cell batteries.
No sharp edges. Low profile curved blades.
Green color coding indicate universal fitting & standard of ISO 7376/3.
